added: Capture pipeline: 4 source adapters (manual, claude-code, cowork, codex)
Memory taxonomy: 9 types + facet vocabulary + lifecycle states
Promoter with auto-allowlist (confidence>=0.85 + type in {vendor-fact, do-not-repeat, bug-pattern})
Weekly digest (scripts/memory-digest.js) with auto-promote-to-candidate for high-recurrence patterns
proved: 4 entries auto-promoted to active from synthetic transcript (test-session 2026-05-05)
30 brain-migration entries land as candidates per agent-coordination work
Recall returns scoped entries; Shay context block populates correctly for site/plan/workspace facets
Digest produces clean ~/PENDING-REVIEW.md report with no false-stale flags
remaining_work: Adversarial review loop applied to memory promotions
Smarter classifier to reduce near-duplicate type matches

memory_candidates.title: Memory store uses per-entry markdown with YAML frontmatter, not SQLite
memory_candidates.body: Per D4 from chat-capture-learn-optimize plan: memory/<type>/<id>.md with YAML frontmatter is the canonical format. Git-friendly, diffable, human-readable. SQLite layer added only if query patterns demand it later.

memory_candidates.title: Memory telemetry is local-only, configurable disable
memory_candidates.body: memory/usage.jsonl is append-only and never transmitted off-device. Disable entirely with MEMORY_TELEMETRY=off env var.
